signal_text: IMD forecasts 23% below normal rainfall over Vidarbha and Marathwada regions during Kharif 2026 season. Drought-like conditions expected by August.
RBI Monetary Policy Committee reduces repo rate by 25 basis points to 6.0%. Home loan and MSME lending rates expected to fall in 2-4 weeks.
PM-KISAN 20th installment of Rs 2000 to be credited to 8.5 crore beneficiary Jan Dhan accounts on August 1, 2026.
Union Budget 2026 expands MSME credit guarantee scheme. Collateral-free loans up to Rs 5 crore now available for registered MSMEs with SBI partnership.
